# Detailed Training Strategy Comparison

This report contains **every recorded data point** for all strategies, sorted by epoch and deduplicated.

| Standard | 23.40% | 19.64% | 25 |
| Linear | 84.98% | 79.39% | 87 |
| Focal | 87.59% | 82.52% | 200 |
| Focal+Transform | 53.85% | 48.05% | 64 |
